🎯 Our Mission
Momento helps traders, importers and currency watchers know exactly when to act. We combine AI signals, payment timing intelligence and real-time alerts into one powerful platform.
⚡ What We Offer
AI Trading Signals — Entry, TP & SL for Forex, Crypto, Gold & Indices.

Payment Calendar — Know the best day to pay your suppliers in any currency.

Smart Alerts — Sound + vibration the moment prices hit your target.

AI Analysis — Plain language explanations of any market condition.
💎 Unlock Momento Pro
Open a verified trading account through our trusted partners and unlock Momento Pro — the smart way to trade.
📬 Contact Us
Have questions or feedback?
AI Chat

Follow us for market updates and tips.
Important Disclaimer
⚠ NOT FINANCIAL ADVICE
Momento provides financial information and analysis for educational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial, investment, or trading advice.
📊 About Our Signals
  • All signals and recommendations are generated algorithmically and may be inaccurate
  • Past performance does not guarantee future results
  • Markets are unpredictable — any trade may result in a loss
  • Never invest more than you can afford to lose
  • AI-generated analysis is for informational purposes only
⚖️ Regulatory Notice
  • Momento is not licensed as a financial advisor in Japan or any other jurisdiction
  • We do not provide investment advice regulated under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act (FIEA) or equivalent legislation
  • Users in regulated jurisdictions should consult a licensed financial professional before making any investment decisions
✅ Your Responsibility
  • By using this app you agree that all trading and financial decisions are your own responsibility
  • Momento and its developers are not liable for any financial losses arising from use of this app
  • For regulated financial advice, consult a licensed professional in your jurisdiction
Terms & Privacy
📋 Terms of Service
  • The service is provided "as-is" without warranties of any kind
  • We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time
  • Users must be 18 years of age or older to use Momento
  • Prohibited activities include: market manipulation, illegal trading activity, and any activity that violates applicable law
  • Accounts may be suspended for violations of these terms
🔒 Privacy Policy
  • What we collect: Email address, app usage data, and alert preferences
  • What we do NOT do: We never sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes
  • Data storage: All data is stored securely on Supabase (EU-based servers) with encryption at rest and in transit
  • Data deletion: You can request full deletion of your account and data at any time by contacting us
  • Cookies: We use minimal local storage only for app preferences — no tracking cookies
📬 Contact
For privacy requests, data deletion, or legal inquiries:

support@momento.app

We aim to respond within 5 business days.
